commands.review_summary:
The PR moves pending final-delivery cleanup before the post-delivery dispatch abort check in `dispatchReplyFromConfig`.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main delivers the final payload, then checks abort before clearing `pendingFinalDelivery`, while stuck-session recovery can abort active work concurrently. I did not run a live race reproduction in this read-only review.
